creator: pizzamig@freebsd.org
text:
clang provided with FreeBSD 10.3 crashes building gdb, it's a known problem.

As workaround, we're using the c++14-lang requirement to force the installation and usage of a newer clang (4.0)

Can you please attach some log files? I cannot understand where the problem is, because it passed all our build test, on FreeBSD 10.3 as well.
